description: This file contains React component definitions for various UI primitives used in a dashboard application, including Card, DrilldownCard, Legend, BarChartLike, LineChartLike, PieChartLike, Gauge, SimpleTable, HeatmapGrid, and NetworkGraph. It exports multiple components that provide visual representations and interactive elements for dashboards.

methods.name: Card({ title, subtitle, children, actions, roleBadge, ariaLabel })
methods.description: A styled, accessible card container with optional header and actions.

methods.name: DrilldownCard({ title, subtitle, children, roleBadge })
methods.description: A Card variant that includes an export PNG action and uses a ref for snapshotting content.

methods.name: Legend({ items })
methods.description: A simple visual legend with colored dots.

methods.name: BarChartLike({ data, xKey, yKey, color = "#3b82f6", maxHeight = 140 })
methods.description: A lightweight bar chart visualization using div elements.

methods.name: LineChartLike({ data, xKey, yKey, color = "#10b981" })
methods.description: A simple sparkline-like line chart using divs.

methods.name: PieChartLike({ parts })
methods.description: A pie/donut chart rendered with conic-gradient and a legend.

methods.name: Gauge({ value, max = 100, label = "Gauge", color = "#f59e0b" })
methods.description: A semi-circular gauge component visualizing a percentage value.

methods.name: SimpleTable({ columns, rows, onRowClick })
methods.description: A basic sortable table component with customizable columns and rows.

methods.name: HeatmapGrid({ values, xLabels = [], yLabels = [], valueToColor })
methods.description: A heatmap visualization grid with customizable coloring.

methods.name: NetworkGraph({ nodes, links })
methods.description: A simplified network diagram using SVG lines and absolutely positioned nodes.

ctags.name: BarChartLike
ctags.pattern: /^export function BarChartLike({ data, xKey, yKey, color = "#3b82f6", maxHeight = 140 }) {$/

ctags.name: Card
ctags.pattern: /^export function Card({ title, subtitle, children, actions, roleBadge, ariaLabel }) {$/
ctags.signature: ({ title, subtitle, children, actions, roleBadge, ariaLabel })

ctags.name: DrilldownCard
ctags.pattern: /^export function DrilldownCard({ title, subtitle, children, roleBadge }) {$/

ctags.name: Gauge
ctags.pattern: /^export function Gauge({ value, max = 100, label = "Gauge", color = "#f59e0b" }) {$/

ctags.name: HeatmapGrid
ctags.pattern: /^export function HeatmapGrid({ values, xLabels = [], yLabels = [], valueToColor }) {$/

ctags.name: LineChartLike
ctags.pattern: /^export function LineChartLike({ data, xKey, yKey, color = "#10b981" }) {$/
